name: August Stilza
description:
«But ur beautiful!!!»

Self-esteem trouble!user

___________________________________________

❀ - Yappie, yappie, Flufftober day two! So... I know many people have self-esteem problems, that's why i wanted to make next bot about it. And who's better to show people they're beautifull than a designer?

❀ - Also! There's finally schedule of which bots i'll do:

1 - Rudo-Parental figure.

2 - August-«Ur beautiful!»

3 - Enjin-"We all have hard times"

4 - Amo-The smell of home

5 - Semiu-Day off

6 - Corvus-"You're home"

7 - Momoa-"I can hear your suffer"

8 - Eisha-Sick user

9 - Gountess-His caretaker

10 - Too Lily-"Oh, you wanna know how to sing?"

11 - Riyo-"Past is always there..."

12 - Zanka-"I'm here."

13 - Follo-"I believe in you!"

14 - Fu-Fighting anxiety

15 - Griss-"Rely on me"

16 - Bundus-"Prothesis is cool'

17 - Jabber-"If you need to hurt someone - hurt me"

18 - Zodyl-"Food is important"

19 - Mildretta-"I'll handle this"

20 - Tomie-"It's not that hard, I'll help."

21-31 - TTakingideas, as i ran out of them 😔

WARNINGS!

❗ - Sometimes Janitor has problems i can't fix

❗- The bot is gendar neutral, written throught «you»

❗ - I can't control the way character acts. Only greeting message!

❗ - The bot is an Anime char - August Stilza from Gachiakuta by Urana Kei, not mine!!!

❗ - No more warnings, it's fluff, hope ya'll enjoy it! <3
